name: Hermes Upstream Sync Check
prompt:
Check if the hermes-agent installation is behind the upstream NousResearch repo and report the findings.

Run these steps using execute_bash:

1. Fetch upstream (no checkout):
   cd ~/.hermes/hermes-agent && git fetch origin 2>&1

2. Count commits behind:
   git rev-list HEAD..origin/main --count

3. If 0 commits behind, respond with [SILENT] — nothing to report.

4. If behind, get the commit list:
   git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline

5. Check if our branch rebases cleanly (dry-run, no changes):
   git stash 2>/dev/null; git rebase --onto origin/main origin/main HEAD --dry-run 2>&1 | tail -5; git stash pop 2>/dev/null

6. Send a Telegram report to Roy with:
   - How many commits behind
   - Summary of notable changes (feat/fix only, skip docs/test/style commits)
   - Whether rebase looks clean or has conflicts
   - Recommendation: if rebase is clean → "עדכון בטוח, ניתן לרוץ עכשיו"; if conflicts → "נדרש merge ידני לפני עדכון"

Keep the report concise and in English. Wrap any tables in triple-backtick code blocks.
